description: Lead incident, problem, and change management for a banking environment. Bridging engineering and operations — making sure the systems that move money stay up, audited, and improving.
responsibilities: Run incident response for production banking systems, owning P1 escalations end-to-end
Design and maintain the change advisory board process with risk-weighted approvals
Build SLA dashboards and service catalogues that leadership actually uses
Author post-incident reviews and drive corrective actions to closure
Integrate ITSM tooling with monitoring and CI/CD so change isn't a spreadsheet
achievements: Cut average P1 resolution time by 38% in the first year
Migrated the change management process from email-based to a structured workflow
Built an executive-facing SLA dashboard adopted across the IT org

description: Owned customer-facing operations for digital banking products — the on-the-ground view of what users actually need.
responsibilities: Resolved tier-2 customer escalations across digital channels
Translated customer feedback into actionable product requirements
Trained frontline agents on new digital banking features
achievements: Built a feedback-to-roadmap pipeline that fed 20+ product improvements
Achieved a 96% CSAT on handled tickets

description: Rotational program across network operations, BSS, and software engineering teams. Found my lane: software.
responsibilities: Shadowed senior engineers across network and software teams
Built internal tooling to automate repetitive operational tasks
Completed certification in network fundamentals and BSS
achievements: Automated a weekly reporting task, saving ~12 engineer-hours/week
Won the trainee cohort's innovation award

description: Building production software across web, mobile, and AI. Side projects became real products. Real products became revenue.
responsibilities: Design and ship end-to-end web and mobile applications
Build ML-powered features and integrate LLM APIs into production
Own architecture, deployment, monitoring, and the 2am pager
achievements: Shipped multiple production apps with thousands of active users
Built and deployed ML models for classification and recommendation
Open-source contributions in tooling and developer experience
